perturbed_task_language: Pick the alphabet soup and place it in the basket
perturbation_semantics: object positions swapped from base layout (alphabet_soup, basket, butter, cream_cheese, milk, salad_dressing, tomato_sauce arranged on living-room table; basket on right, can mostly occluded behind salad_dressing)
expected_baseline_behavior: Pi0 fullshot likely picks the wrong object (tomato_sauce or salad_dressing) since alphabet_soup is partially occluded behind the salad_dressing bottle
strategy_notes: OBJECT frame (eef home z=0.261, table z=0). Localized alphabet_soup by combining (1) agentview RGB color cue — visible blue+yellow Campbell's-style label peeked from behind salad_dressing at pixels ~(108-118, 110-114) in image_cam_00.png, world_00.npy[110,112]=(-0.176,-0.063,0.07); and (2) wrist coarse-fine refinement — moved eef to (-0.18,-0.07,0.20) over rough target, then wrist world_wrist_01.npy showed the alphabet_soup can top as a dark elevated disc at world (~-0.21,-0.08,top z=0.075). Re-centered to (-0.21,-0.08,0.18). First Pi0 attempt with sub-prompt 'pick up the alphabet soup' (22 chunks) drifted in y and bumped can over without grasping (peak_lift=0.004). Reset, re-pre-positioned, climbed prompt ladder to FULL task language 'Pick the alphabet soup and place it in the basket' — Pi0 grasped in 7 chunks (peak_lift=0.101, gripper_qpos width 0.056). Carry path split into 2 waypoints (Δy=0.32 exceeds OSC 0.30 single-step cap): WP1 (-0.10,+0.10,0.25), WP2 basket (0.015,0.263,0.25). Basket center localized from world_00 by scanning rim pixels (z=0.10-0.15) at cols 175-235: median (+0.015, +0.263, rim z=0.145). Descended to z=0.20 and released — predicate fired libero_terminated=true.
